err.couldNotReach: Could not reach the Owner Settings API / database. Please confirm your VAiyu backend and Supabase are reachable.
err.couldNotSave: Could not reach the Owner Settings API / database while saving. Please check your connection and try again.

ok.kycOpening: Account created — opening KYC in a new tab.

ops.title: Operations & Policies
ops.googlePlaceIdHint: Guests who rate 4★+ get a one-tap "review on Google" link. Find your ID with Google's Place ID Finder — search your hotel's name.

guest.title: Guest Information
guest.notesPlaceholder: Pool timing, emergency numbers, or standard property rules...
guest.notesHint: This information will be displayed to guests on their dashboard after they check in.

link.title: Guest link (WhatsApp + QR)
link.desc: Share this link with guests at check-in. It opens your VAiyu Scan screen, which then routes them to the in-room menu and services for this property.
link.qrTitle: QR for room standee / table tent
link.qrMissing: Slug missing – save hotel first to enable sharing.

razorpay.title: Online Payments
razorpay.desc: Choose how this hotel accepts online payments from guests. You can switch modes later without losing historical payment records.

mode.directHint: Funds settle to your bank; vaiyu integrates

direct.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Razorpay? Online payments will be disabled for this hotel. Existing payments and refunds are preserved.
direct.keyIdError: Must start with rzp_test_ or rzp_live_
direct.secretHint: From your Razorpay Dashboard → Settings → API Keys. Stored encrypted at rest.

none.hint: This hotel is on cash only. Walk-in cash collection still works everywhere; only the "Pay Online" buttons across the app are hidden.

webhook.title: Next: register this webhook in Razorpay
webhook.localDevHint: Razorpay's servers can't reach your localhost — trying to register this URL will fail. Skip webhook registration for local testing; the verify-payment path records payments without webhooks.
webhook.instructions: Open your Razorpay Dashboard → Settings → Webhooks → Add. Paste these values and subscribe to the listed events.
webhook.verifyHint: Verify it's your account: after registering the webhook, make a ₹1 test payment and confirm the transaction appears in your Razorpay Dashboard.

route.feePct: Platform retains {{pct}}% per transaction via Route's transfers[] split.
route.accountIdFormatError: Invalid format — Razorpay Linked Account IDs start with "acc_".
route.noAccount: Don't have a Linked Account yet?

wa.title: WhatsApp notifications
wa.desc: Send pre-checkin reminders, confirmations and updates to guests on WhatsApp.
wa.tokenNote: The Graph API access token is stored centrally — you don't need to provide it.
wa.phoneNumberIdHint: Numeric ID Meta assigns to your business number.
wa.displayNumberHint: Shown to guests on QR posters and wa.me links.
wa.enableDesc: When off, all WhatsApp messages for this hotel are skipped (email/SMS fallbacks still run).
wa.noPhoneError: Enter the Meta phone_number_id before enabling.
wa.infoHintPost: after the platform admin adds your number to the VAiyu Business App.

interakt.title: Interakt (WhatsApp BSP)
interakt.desc: Approved templates via Interakt. Pre-checkin, check-out reminders, payment receipts, and inbound service requests.
interakt.providerInteraktDesc: Use approved templates routed via Interakt's BSP. Best for production.
interakt.providerMetaDesc: Use Meta Cloud API directly. Free-text only; templates limited.
interakt.dailyCapHint: When the cap is hit, new WhatsApp notifications queue for the next day. 0 disables outbound WhatsApp.
interakt.templateNotWiredAlert: {{count}} WhatsApp notifications queued in the last 7 days but 0 sent. Likely cause: Interakt templates not yet registered.

aiConsent.title: AI Quote Drafts
aiConsent.desc: Allow your front-desk team to use Anthropic Claude to draft quote proposals from real lead data. Drafts are always edited and approved by your team before being sent. Token usage is logged and capped per day.
aiConsent.footer: When enabled, the AI uses your guest's name, dates and party size to draft a proposal. Never invents prices or availability. The disclaimer line is always included.
